<?php namespace Illuminate\Contracts\Mail; interface Mailer { /** * Begin the process of mailing a mailable class instance. * * @param mixed $users * @return \Illuminate\Mail\PendingMail */ public function to($users); /** * Begin the process of mailing a mailable class instance. * * @param mixed $users * @return \Illuminate\Mail\PendingMail */ public function bcc($users); /** * Send a new message with only a raw text part. * * @param string $text * @param mixed $callback * @return \Illuminate\Mail\SentMessage|null */ public function raw($text, $callback); /** * Send a new message using a view. * * @param \Illuminate\Contracts\Mail\Mailable|string|array $view * @param array $data * @param \Closure|string|null $callback * @return \Illuminate\Mail\SentMessage|null */ public function send($view, array $data = [], $callback = null); /** * Send a new message synchronously using a view. * * @param \Illuminate\Contracts\Mail\Mailable|string|array $mailable * @param array $data * @param \Closure|string|null $callback * @return \Illuminate\Mail\SentMessage|null */ public function sendNow($mailable, array $data = [], $callback = null); }
